admissible_use: detector cutoff observation class; historical equation reconstruction; not latent-gap point pooling
composition_provenance: density-calibrated electron microprobe; nominal limit up to +/-0.006 or source-specific Table III value; fitted adjusted x also reported
model_conditioning: half-peak detector cutoff converted with Eg=1.24/lambda_um; adjusted x values used in empirical fit
notes: Eight photoconductive/photovoltaic detectors. Table III contains 56 exact temperature-cutoff-energy rows. Cutoff is the half-peak response wavelength.
title: Temperature and Alloy Compositional Dependences of the Energy Gap of Hg1-xCdxTe

admissible_use: specimen lineage, carrier density, mobility and effective-mass metadata; not independent validation of the supplied gap law
composition_provenance: density values supplied by Honeywell or Lincoln Laboratory microprobe; source states microprobe confirmation to +/-5% accuracy
model_conditioning: measured masses compared with Kane calculations using literature Eg(x,T) and Ep; not an independent gap determination
notes: Table I identifies sample 4 at x=0.203 and 77 K. McCombe note 6 explicitly identifies its specimen as sample 4(1) of this source.
title: Helicons and Nonresonant Cyclotron Absorption in Semiconductors. II. Hg1-xCdxTe

admissible_use: model-conditioned low-temperature gap anchor with shared specimen lineage and carrier metadata
composition_provenance: inherited from Wiley-Dexter sample 4(1); pointwise absolute x sigma not reported
model_conditioning: Bowers-Yafet transition fit; reports Eg, Ep and zero-field g
notes: Reports Eg=0.064+/-0.003 eV, Ep=18.5+/-1 eV and g=-172. Note 6 gives n=9e14 cm^-3 and mobility=2e5 cm^2/V s at liquid-nitrogen temperature.
title: Infrared Pulsed Gas Laser Studies of Combined Resonance and Cyclotron-Phonon Resonance in Hg1-xCdxTe

admissible_use: same-specimen temperature-induced gap-sign constraint; not a fabricated numerical gap pair
composition_provenance: electron microprobe; homogeneous better than stated +/-0.003 limit
model_conditioning: magnetoreflection transition assignment and multiband fit
notes: The source states the Gamma6-Gamma8 separation is slightly negative at 4 K and slightly positive at 77 K.
title: Interband Magnetoreflection of Hg1-xCdxTe

model_conditioning: coupled Gamma6-Gamma7-Gamma8 magnetoreflection fit; uncertainty reflects higher-band parameters
notes: Reports signed Gamma6-Gamma8 separation -0.283+/-0.001 eV, estimated near 30 K. Note added in proof reports magnitude near 0.30 eV at 1.5 K.
title: Interband Magnetoreflection and Band Structure of HgTe

admissible_use: candidate absorption observation operator; mechanism evidence for tail and carrier filling
composition_provenance: sample-specific provenance varies and must be extracted before point use
composition_scope: multiple narrow-gap THM and MBE samples
model_conditioning: semiempirical Kane-region plus exponential tail and band-filling factors
notes: Do not confuse the paper's permanent-broadening symbol Ep with Kane energy Ep. No universal material-law authority.
title: A New Model for the Absorption Coefficient of Narrow-Gap (Hg,Cd)Te That Simultaneously Considers Band Tails and Band Filling

admissible_use: near-edge feature-class ambiguity and impurity-offset evidence
composition_provenance: MBE nominal composition; independent point uncertainty not recovered
model_conditioning: low-field photoreflectance lineshape fits and thermal activation model
notes: Arsenic-doped Hg0.713Cd0.287Te; p-type at 77 K and n-type at room temperature. Multiple below-gap and band-band features evolve differently with temperature.
title: Evolution of Infrared Photoreflectance Lineshape with Temperature in Narrow-Gap HgCdTe Epilayers
